use_cases: Interactive product showcase cards that respond to mouse movement with 3D rotation
Feature highlight cards on landing pages with engaging hover effects
Portfolio or gallery items with depth and dimensionality
Pricing tier cards with premium interactive feel
Testimonial or review cards with dynamic visual feedback
ai_summary: A 3D tilt effect card component that rotates in response to mouse movement, creating depth and interactivity. Built on a shadcn/ui-style card system with Header, Title, Description, Content, and Footer subcomponents. The effect tracks cursor position and applies CSS transforms to create perspective rotation, making elements feel responsive and premium.
